translations.en: Supplication of the traveller for the resident

text.arabic: أَسْتَـوْدِعُكُـمُ اللَّهَ الَّذي لا تَضـيعُ وَدائِعُـه

translations.en: I place you in the trust of Allah, whose trust is never misplaced.

items.reference: Ahmad 2/403, Ibn Majah 2/943. See also Al-Albani, Sahih Ibn Majah 2/133.
